description: Welcome to my portfolio! I'm a Full Stack .NET Developer with a passion for building modern, scalable, and user-focused applications. I specialize in C#, ASP.NET Core, Blazor, Angular, SQL Server, and cloud technologies, with a growing focus on Microsoft Azure and AI-powered solutions. I enjoy transforming complex business requirements into clean, efficient software while continuously learning new technologies to deliver better digital experiences.
detailOrQuote: I believe great software is built by combining clean architecture, continuous learning, and a focus on solving real-world problems. My goal is to build scalable cloud-native applications that create meaningful value while growing as a Full Stack .NET and Cloud Engineer.
